scripts.verify-logic: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=roombox-test npx ts-node --project scripts/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/verify-system-integrity.ts
scripts.migrate:local: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=roombox-test npm run migrate
scripts.audit:owner: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=roombox-test npx ts-node --transpile-only --project scripts/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/audit-owner-journey.ts
scripts.audit:tenant: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=roombox-test npx ts-node --transpile-only --project scripts/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/audit-tenant-whatsapp.ts
scripts.audit:launch: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=roombox-test npx ts-node --transpile-only --project scripts/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/audit-launch-readiness.ts
scripts.audit:load: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=roombox-test npx ts-node --transpile-only --project scripts/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/audit-load-simulation.ts
scripts.audit:financial: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=roombox-test npx ts-node --transpile-only --project scripts/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/audit-financial-cycle.ts
scripts.audit:pilot: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=roombox-test ts-node --transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/verify-pilot-readiness.ts
scripts.audit:guests: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=roombox-test npx ts-node --transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/audit-guests.ts
scripts.audit:transfer: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=roombox-test npx ts-node --transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/audit-transfer-verification.ts
scripts.test:lifecycle: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=roombox-test npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/simulate-rent-lifecycle.ts
scripts.audit: npm run audit:load && npm run audit:financial && npm run audit:failure && npm run audit:pilot && npm run audit:guests && npm run audit:transfer && npm run audit:launch
